entry.title: New: RES25-174 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL AND RELATED EXPENSES AT AN ESTIMATED VALUE OF $3,310 TO THE CITY FROM THE LUSO-AMERICAN DEVELOPMENT FOUNDATION FOR COUNCILMEMBER TYLER DOS SANTOS-TAM TO ATTEND THE SISTER CITIES SUMMIT IN SÃO MIGUEL, AZORES, PORTUGAL FROM JUNE 25-27, 2025.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
